##Figure 1C

library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(wesanderson)
library(tidyr)
library(micropan)
library(rprojroot)
  
  
virome_met_dt <- merge(virome_dt, meta_dt, by = "sample_ID")
virome_met_dt$City_Site <- str_c(virome_met_dt$City, ", ", virome_met_dt$Site)


all_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
mat_all_wide <- as.matrix(all_strain_wide)
all_rare <- rarefaction(mat_all_wide, n.perm = 100)


all_rare$avg <- rowMeans(all_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
all_rare$max_g <- apply(all_rare[,-1], 1, max)
all_rare$min_g <- apply(all_rare[,-1], 1, min)
all_rare$type <- "City"
all_rare$subset <- "All"

AHM_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(City == "Ahmedabad") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)

AHM_wide <- as.matrix(AHM_strain_wide)
AHM_rare <- rarefaction(AHM_wide, n.perm = 100)

AHM_rare$avg <- rowMeans(AHM_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
AHM_rare$max_g <- apply(AHM_rare[,-1], 1, max)
AHM_rare$min_g <- apply(AHM_rare[,-1], 1, min)
AHM_rare$type <- "City"
AHM_rare$subset <- "Ahmedabad"

GAN_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(City == "Gandhinagar") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)

GAN_wide <- as.matrix(GAN_strain_wide)
GAN_rare <- rarefaction(AHM_wide, n.perm = 100)

GAN_rare$avg <- rowMeans(GAN_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
GAN_rare$max_g <- apply(GAN_rare[,-1], 1, max)
GAN_rare$min_g <- apply(GAN_rare[,-1], 1, min)
GAN_rare$type <- "City"
GAN_rare$subset <- "Gandhinagar"

RAJ_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(City == "Rajkot") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)

RAJ_wide <- as.matrix(RAJ_strain_wide)
RAJ_rare <- rarefaction(RAJ_wide, n.perm = 100)

RAJ_rare$avg <- rowMeans(RAJ_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
RAJ_rare$max_g <- apply(RAJ_rare[,-1], 1, max)
RAJ_rare$min_g <- apply(RAJ_rare[,-1], 1, min)
RAJ_rare$type <- "City"
RAJ_rare$subset <- "Rajkot"

BRD_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(City == "Vadodara") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)

BRD_wide <- as.matrix(BRD_strain_wide)
BRD_rare <- rarefaction(BRD_wide, n.perm = 100)

BRD_rare$avg <- rowMeans(BRD_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
BRD_rare$max_g <- apply(BRD_rare[,-1], 1, max)
BRD_rare$min_g <- apply(BRD_rare[,-1], 1, min)
BRD_rare$type <- "City"
BRD_rare$subset <- "Vadodara"


Ambawadi_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Ambawadi") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Ambawadi_wide <- as.matrix(Ambawadi_strain_wide)
Ambawadi_rare <- rarefaction(Ambawadi_wide, n.perm = 100)
Ambawadi_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Ambawadi_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Ambawadi_rare$max_g <- apply(Ambawadi_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Ambawadi_rare$min_g <- apply(Ambawadi_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Ambawadi_rare$type <- "Site"
Ambawadi_rare$subset <- "Ambawadi"

Paldi_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Paldi") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Paldi_wide <- as.matrix(Paldi_strain_wide)
Paldi_rare <- rarefaction(Paldi_wide, n.perm = 100)
Paldi_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Paldi_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Paldi_rare$max_g <- apply(Paldi_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Paldi_rare$min_g <- apply(Paldi_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Paldi_rare$type <- "Site"
Paldi_rare$subset <- "Paldi"

Maninagar_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Maninagar") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Maninagar_wide <- as.matrix(Maninagar_strain_wide)
Maninagar_rare <- rarefaction(Maninagar_wide, n.perm = 100)
Maninagar_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Maninagar_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Maninagar_rare$max_g <- apply(Maninagar_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Maninagar_rare$min_g <- apply(Maninagar_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Maninagar_rare$type <- "Site"
Maninagar_rare$subset <- "Maninagar"

Jamalpur_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Jamalpur") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Jamalpur_wide <- as.matrix(Jamalpur_strain_wide)
Jamalpur_rare <- rarefaction(Jamalpur_wide, n.perm = 100)
Jamalpur_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Jamalpur_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Jamalpur_rare$max_g <- apply(Jamalpur_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Jamalpur_rare$min_g <- apply(Jamalpur_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Jamalpur_rare$type <- "Site"
Jamalpur_rare$subset <- "Jamalpur"

Motera_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Motera") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Motera_wide <- as.matrix(Motera_strain_wide)
Motera_rare <- rarefaction(Motera_wide, n.perm = 100)
Motera_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Motera_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Motera_rare$max_g <- apply(Motera_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Motera_rare$min_g <- apply(Motera_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Motera_rare$type <- "Site"
Motera_rare$subset <- "Motera"

Vasna_MLD_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Vasna MLD") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Vasna_MLD_wide <- as.matrix(Vasna_MLD_strain_wide)
Vasna_MLD_rare <- rarefaction(Vasna_MLD_wide, n.perm = 100)
Vasna_MLD_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Vasna_MLD_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Vasna_MLD_rare$max_g <- apply(Vasna_MLD_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Vasna_MLD_rare$min_g <- apply(Vasna_MLD_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Vasna_MLD_rare$type <- "Site"
Vasna_MLD_rare$subset <- "Vasna MLD"

Pirana_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Pirana") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Pirana_wide <- as.matrix(Pirana_strain_wide)
Pirana_rare <- rarefaction(Pirana_wide, n.perm = 100)
Pirana_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Pirana_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Pirana_rare$max_g <- apply(Pirana_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Pirana_rare$min_g <- apply(Pirana_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Pirana_rare$type <- "Site"
Pirana_rare$subset <- "Pirana"

Ranip_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Ranip") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Ranip_wide <- as.matrix(Ranip_strain_wide)
Ranip_rare <- rarefaction(Ranip_wide, n.perm = 100)
Ranip_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Ranip_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Ranip_rare$max_g <- apply(Ranip_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Ranip_rare$min_g <- apply(Ranip_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Ranip_rare$type <- "Site"
Ranip_rare$subset <- "Ranip"

Vasna_SPS_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Vasna SPS") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Vasna_SPS_wide <- as.matrix(Vasna_SPS_strain_wide)
Vasna_SPS_rare <- rarefaction(Vasna_SPS_wide, n.perm = 100)
Vasna_SPS_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Vasna_SPS_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Vasna_SPS_rare$max_g <- apply(Vasna_SPS_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Vasna_SPS_rare$min_g <- apply(Vasna_SPS_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Vasna_SPS_rare$type <- "Site"
Vasna_SPS_rare$subset <- "Vasna SPS"

Vinzol_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Vinzol") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Vinzol_wide <- as.matrix(Vinzol_strain_wide)
Vinzol_rare <- rarefaction(Vinzol_wide, n.perm = 100)
Vinzol_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Vinzol_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Vinzol_rare$max_g <- apply(Vinzol_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Vinzol_rare$min_g <- apply(Vinzol_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Vinzol_rare$type <- "Site"
Vinzol_rare$subset <- "Vinzol"

Atladara_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Atladara") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Atladara_wide <- as.matrix(Atladara_strain_wide)
Atladara_rare <- rarefaction(Atladara_wide, n.perm = 100)
Atladara_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Atladara_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Atladara_rare$max_g <- apply(Atladara_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Atladara_rare$min_g <- apply(Atladara_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Atladara_rare$type <- "Site"
Atladara_rare$subset <- "Atladara"

Channi_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Channi") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Channi_wide <- as.matrix(Channi_strain_wide)
Channi_rare <- rarefaction(Channi_wide, n.perm = 100)
Channi_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Channi_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Channi_rare$max_g <- apply(Channi_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Channi_rare$min_g <- apply(Channi_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Channi_rare$type <- "Site"
Channi_rare$subset <- "Channi"

Jaspur_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Jaspur") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Jaspur_wide <- as.matrix(Jaspur_strain_wide)
Jaspur_rare <- rarefaction(Jaspur_wide, n.perm = 100)
Jaspur_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Jaspur_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Jaspur_rare$max_g <- apply(Jaspur_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Jaspur_rare$min_g <- apply(Jaspur_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Jaspur_rare$type <- "Site"
Jaspur_rare$subset <- "Jaspur"

Kudasan_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Kudasan") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Kudasan_wide <- as.matrix(Kudasan_strain_wide)
Kudasan_rare <- rarefaction(Kudasan_wide, n.perm = 100)
Kudasan_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Kudasan_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Kudasan_rare$max_g <- apply(Kudasan_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Kudasan_rare$min_g <- apply(Kudasan_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Kudasan_rare$type <- "Site"
Kudasan_rare$subset <- "Kudasan"

Raysan_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Raysan") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Raysan_wide <- as.matrix(Raysan_strain_wide)
Raysan_rare <- rarefaction(Raysan_wide, n.perm = 100)
Raysan_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Raysan_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Raysan_rare$max_g <- apply(Raysan_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Raysan_rare$min_g <- apply(Raysan_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Raysan_rare$type <- "Site"
Raysan_rare$subset <- "Raysan"

Sargasan_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Sargasan") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Sargasan_wide <- as.matrix(Sargasan_strain_wide)
Sargasan_rare <- rarefaction(Sargasan_wide, n.perm = 100)
Sargasan_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Sargasan_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Sargasan_rare$max_g <- apply(Sargasan_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Sargasan_rare$min_g <- apply(Sargasan_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Sargasan_rare$type <- "Site"
Sargasan_rare$subset <- "Sargasan"

Vavol_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Vavol") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Vavol_wide <- as.matrix(Vavol_strain_wide)
Vavol_rare <- rarefaction(Vavol_wide, n.perm = 100)
Vavol_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Vavol_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Vavol_rare$max_g <- apply(Vavol_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Vavol_rare$min_g <- apply(Vavol_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Vavol_rare$type <- "Site"
Vavol_rare$subset <- "Vavol"

Gajarwadi_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Gajarwadi") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Gajarwadi_wide <- as.matrix(Gajarwadi_strain_wide)
Gajarwadi_rare <- rarefaction(Gajarwadi_wide, n.perm = 100)
Gajarwadi_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Gajarwadi_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Gajarwadi_rare$max_g <- apply(Gajarwadi_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Gajarwadi_rare$min_g <- apply(Gajarwadi_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Gajarwadi_rare$type <- "Site"
Gajarwadi_rare$subset <- "Gajarwadi"

Raiyadhar_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Raiyadhar") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Raiyadhar_wide <- as.matrix(Raiyadhar_strain_wide)
Raiyadhar_rare <- rarefaction(Raiyadhar_wide, n.perm = 100)
Raiyadhar_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Raiyadhar_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Raiyadhar_rare$max_g <- apply(Raiyadhar_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Raiyadhar_rare$min_g <- apply(Raiyadhar_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Raiyadhar_rare$type <- "Site"
Raiyadhar_rare$subset <- "Raiyadhar"

Kothariya_Near_NH_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Kothariya Near NH") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Kothariya_Near_NH_wide <- as.matrix(Kothariya_Near_NH_strain_wide)
Kothariya_Near_NH_rare <- rarefaction(Kothariya_Near_NH_wide, n.perm = 100)
Kothariya_Near_NH_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Kothariya_Near_NH_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Kothariya_Near_NH_rare$max_g <- apply(Kothariya_Near_NH_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Kothariya_Near_NH_rare$min_g <- apply(Kothariya_Near_NH_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Kothariya_Near_NH_rare$type <- "Site"
Kothariya_Near_NH_rare$subset <- "Kothariya Near NH"

Kothariya_old_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Kothariya old") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Kothariya_old_wide <- as.matrix(Kothariya_old_strain_wide)
Kothariya_old_rare <- rarefaction(Kothariya_old_wide, n.perm = 100)
Kothariya_old_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Kothariya_old_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Kothariya_old_rare$max_g <- apply(Kothariya_old_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Kothariya_old_rare$min_g <- apply(Kothariya_old_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Kothariya_old_rare$type <- "Site"
Kothariya_old_rare$subset <- "Kothariya old"

Popatpara_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Popatpara") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Popatpara_wide <- as.matrix(Popatpara_strain_wide)
Popatpara_rare <- rarefaction(Popatpara_wide, n.perm = 100)
Popatpara_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Popatpara_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Popatpara_rare$max_g <- apply(Popatpara_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Popatpara_rare$min_g <- apply(Popatpara_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Popatpara_rare$type <- "Site"
Popatpara_rare$subset <- "Popatpara"

Raiya_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Raiya") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Raiya_wide <- as.matrix(Raiya_strain_wide)
Raiya_rare <- rarefaction(Raiya_wide, n.perm = 100)
Raiya_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Raiya_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Raiya_rare$max_g <- apply(Raiya_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Raiya_rare$min_g <- apply(Raiya_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Raiya_rare$type <- "Site"
Raiya_rare$subset <- "Raiya"

Tarsali_strain_wide <- 
  virome_met_dt %>% 
  filter(Site == "Tarsali") %>%
  group_by(strain, sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = mean(RPKMF)) %>%
  distinct(strain, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0) %>%
  subset(select = -sample_ID)
Tarsali_wide <- as.matrix(Tarsali_strain_wide)
Tarsali_rare <- rarefaction(Tarsali_wide, n.perm = 100)
Tarsali_rare$avg <- rowMeans(Tarsali_rare[,-1], na.rm=TRUE)
Tarsali_rare$max_g <- apply(Tarsali_rare[,-1], 1, max)
Tarsali_rare$min_g <- apply(Tarsali_rare[,-1], 1, min)
Tarsali_rare$type <- "Site"
Tarsali_rare$subset <- "Tarsali"


multi_rare_site <- rbind(Ambawadi_rare, Paldi_rare, Maninagar_rare, Jamalpur_rare, Motera_rare, Vasna_MLD_rare, Pirana_rare, Ranip_rare, Vasna_SPS_rare, Vinzol_rare, Jaspur_rare, Kudasan_rare, Raysan_rare, Sargasan_rare, Vavol_rare, Atladara_rare, Channi_rare, Gajarwadi_rare, Tarsali_rare, Raiyadhar_rare, Kothariya_Near_NH_rare, Kothariya_old_rare, Popatpara_rare, Raiya_rare)

scale_color_manual(values = c(
  "Ahmedabad" = "#0070c0",
  "Gandhinagar" = "#da3030",
  "Vadodara" = "#354e68",
  "Rajkot" = "#ffa700"
))

custom_scale <- wes_palette("Darjeeling1", 5, type = "continuous")

allg <- ggplot(all_rare, aes(x=Genome,y=avg)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(x=Genome,ymin=min_g,ymax=max_g,fill=subset),alpha=0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x=Genome,y=avg,col=subset), size = 1.2, alpha = 0.95) +
  xlab("Samples from wastewater") + 
  ylab("Number of Unique Strains Detected") +
  facet_wrap(vars(type), nrow=1, scales = "free_x", labeller = labeller(type = c("City" = "Total Samples"))) +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("All" = "black")) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("All" = "black")) + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        legend.position = "none") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
                                         strip.text = element_text(size=13)) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"), strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid"))

allg 

multi_rare <- rbind(AHM_rare, GAN_rare, BRD_rare, RAJ_rare)
cityg <- ggplot(multi_rare, aes(x=Genome,y=avg)) +
  #geom_ribbon(aes(x=Genome,ymin=min_g,ymax=max_g,fill=subset),alpha=0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x=Genome,y=avg,col=subset), size = 1.2, alpha = 0.95) +
  xlab("Samples from wastewater") + 
  ylab("Number of Unique Strains Detected") +
  facet_wrap(vars(type), nrow=1, scales = "free_x") +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Ahmedabad" = "#0070c0",
    "Gandhinagar" = "#da3030",
    "Vadodara" = "#354e68",
    "Rajkot" = "#ffa700")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Ahmedabad" = "#0070c0",
    "Gandhinagar" = "#da3030",
    "Vadodara" = "#354e68",
    "Rajkot" = "#ffa700"), name = NULL) +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 13), legend.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 13), legend.position = c(0.65, 0.45),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  # Semi-transparent background
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10), strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid"), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"))

  
cityg

virome_met_dt %>% distinct(Site)

pal <- wes_palette("Darjeeling1", 24, type = "continuous")

siteg <-  ggplot(multi_rare_site, aes(x=Genome,y=avg)) +
  #geom_ribbon(aes(x=Genome,ymin=min_g,ymax=max_g,fill=subset),alpha=0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x=Genome,y=avg,col=subset), size = 1.2, alpha = 0.95) +
  xlab("Samples from wastewater") + 
  ylab("Number of Unique Strains Detected") +
  facet_wrap(vars(type), nrow=1, scales = "free_x") +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal, name = NULL) +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10), legend.position = c(0.65, 0.15), legend.key.size = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  # Semi-transparent background
        #        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1.2),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10), strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid"), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"))


siteg


gridExtra::grid.arrange(allg, cityg, siteg, ncol = 3)


##Figure 1D


library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(rprojroot)
library(vegan)
library(wesanderson)


seqname_sID_wide_dt <- 
  virome_dt %>% 
  subset(select = c("sequence_name", "sample_ID", "RPKMF")) %>%
  distinct(sequence_name, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sequence_name, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0)

sampleID_l <- seqname_sID_wide_dt$sample_ID

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- seqname_sID_wide_dt %>% subset(select = -sample_ID)

Calculate shannon diversity

shannon_d <- vegan::diversity(seqname_sID_wide_dt, index = "shannon")

sample_diversity <- cbind(sampleID_l, shannon_d)
sample_diversity <- as.data.frame(sample_diversity)
setDT(sample_diversity)

sample_diversity_meta <- merge(sample_diversity, meta_dt, by.x = "sampleID_l", by.y = "sample_ID")
sample_diversity_meta$City_Site <- str_c(sample_diversity_meta$City, ", ", sample_diversity_meta$Site)

sample_diversity_meta$Date <- as.Date(sample_diversity_meta$Date, , "%m-%d-%Y")

sample_diversity_meta$shannon_d <- as.numeric(sample_diversity_meta$shannon_d)

plot diversity by site

library(RColorBrewer)
nb.cols <- 24
mycolors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(8, "Set1"))(nb.cols)

sample_diversity_meta %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Site, y = shannon_d, fill = City_Site)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0) +
  geom_point(pch = 2, position = position_jitterdodge(), color = "black") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = custom_scale) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = custom_scale[c(3:6,8:21)]) + 
  #scale_fill_manual(values = c("#ff9b34","#ff693a", "#e14076", "#4b383a", "#00a8bb", "#99e2b4", "#ffe66d", "#ff6b6b", "#4ecdc4", "#1a535c", "#eef0eb", "#7ae582", "#a5be00", "#fdc921", "#b4b8ab", "#054a91")) + # Adding 16 unique colors based on 16 sites in 3 diiferent cities
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycolors) + 
  #scale_fill_manual(values = site_palette_gra) + 
  facet_wrap(vars(City), scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "", y = "Shannon Diversity") +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        legend.position = "Off") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=13),
                                         strip.text = element_text(size=13)) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"), strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid"))



##Figure 1E

library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(wesanderson)
library(tidyr)
library(micropan)
library(rprojroot)

virome_met_dt <- merge(virome_dt, meta_dt, by = "sample_ID")
virome_met_dt$City_Site <- str_c(virome_met_dt$City, ", ", virome_met_dt$Site)


virome_met_dt <- virome_met_dt %>%
  mutate(coverage = covered_bases/reference_length) %>%
  mutate(cov_category = case_when(
    coverage >= 0.9 ~ "Over 90%",
    coverage < 0.9 & coverage >= 0.5 ~ "50% - 90%",
    coverage < 0.5 & coverage >= 0.1 ~ "10% - 50%",
    TRUE ~ "Less"
  ))
  

mean_category <- virome_met_dt %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, cov_category) %>%
  summarize(seqs = n_distinct(sequence_name)) %>%
  filter(cov_category != "Less") %>%
  group_by(cov_category) %>%
  summarize(mean_seqs_per_sample = mean(seqs))  # Compute mean
  
custom_scale <- wes_palette("Darjeeling1", 3, type = "continuous")


violinp <- virome_met_dt %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, cov_category) %>%
  summarize(seqs = n_distinct(sequence_name)) %>%
  filter(cov_category != "Less") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cov_category, y = seqs, fill = cov_category)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = cov_category), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.3) +  # Jitter points
  
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.5, color = "grey20", draw_quantiles = c(0.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_scale) +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_scale) +
  geom_text(data = mean_category, 
            aes(x = cov_category, y = mean_seqs_per_sample + 2, 
                label = paste("", round(mean_seqs_per_sample, 1))), 
            fontface = "bold", size = 5, color = "black") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Coverage Category",
       y = "Number of Viral Genomes/Segments per Sample") +
  
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13))


violinp


##Figure 1G

library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(wesanderson)
library(tidyr)
library(micropan)
library(rprojroot)
virome_met_dt <- merge(virome_dt, meta_dt, by = "sample_ID")

virome_met_dt$City_Site <- str_c(virome_met_dt$City, ", ", virome_met_dt$Site)

median_strains <- virome_met_dt %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, City_Site) %>%
  summarize(strains = n_distinct(strain)) %>%
  group_by(City_Site) %>%
  summarize(median_strains = median(strains))

median_strains
strainsp <- virome_met_dt %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, City_Site) %>%
  summarize(strains = n_distinct(strain)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = strains, fill = City_Site)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.8, color = "black") +
  geom_rug() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycolors) +
  
  geom_vline(data = median_strains, aes(xintercept = median_strains), size = 0.6, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  geom_text(data = median_strains, aes(x = median_strains - 5, y = 0.02, label = median_strains), 
            angle = 90, vjust = -0.5, hjust = 1, size = 4.5, fontface = "bold") +
  
  facet_wrap(vars(City_Site), strip.position = "top", labeller = label_wrap_gen(width = 20)) +
  
  labs(x = "Strains detected per sample") +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 1), 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
        plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "cm")) 
strainsp
